name: Delete
short_description: Let the number tell you what to do
detailed_description:
Delete is a minimalist puzzle leisure game.it is inspired by Minesweeper. It inherits all the excellent features of the original work, and has increased its spatial dimensions.

Your goal is to turn over all the squares, figures show the number of unknown red squares around them, you need to deduce all the answers by being reminded of by the figures

There is no time or star limit in the game, you are supposed to enjoy the relaxing experience.

Like my works before, it will keep introducing new ways of playing, the difficulty will progressively increase.



  • The design of 50 levels with different shapes
  • 7 different ways of playing and combination
  • All riddles can be reasoned
  • Simple and pure artistic style and ways of the game
  • No language interfaces and content

Trading Card
